name: BMW BMW i5 eDrive
description: The 2026 BMW i5 eDrive35L is a fully electric executive sedan that delivers a quiet, luxurious driving experience with a 286-horsepower rear-wheel-drive powertrain, 79.05 kWh battery, and up to 536 km of CLTC driving range. Its long-wheelbase design provides outstanding rear passenger comfort while retaining BMW's premium technology, refined interior, and engaging driving characteristics.
features:
105 mm

The extended wheelbase provides exceptional rear-seat legroom

making it ideal for executive or chauffeur-driven use.

Interior Features
12.3-inch digital instrument cluster
14.9-inch curved central touchscreen
BMW Operating System 8.5
Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto
Premium ambient lighting
Panoramic glass roof
Heated and ventilated seats (depending on trim)
Harman Kardon premium sound system
Wireless phone charging
Four-zone climate control (available)
Safety & Driver Assistance
Adaptive Cruise Control
Lane Keeping Assist
Blind Spot Monitoring
Automatic Emergency Braking
360° Surround View Camera
Parking Assistant Plus
Traffic Sign Recognition
Driver Attention Monitoring

name: Xiaomi Xiaomi YU7 B4
description: The Xiaomi YU7 B4 (Pro AWD) is a premium electric SUV featuring 489 hp, 690 Nm of torque, a 96.3 kWh battery, up to 770 km CLTC driving range, and 0–100 km/h in just 4.27 seconds. It combines luxury, cutting-edge technology, fast charging, advanced autonomous driving hardware, and long-distance capability, making it one of the strongest competitors to the Tesla Model Y in the premium EV segment.
features:
| Specification    | Details                          |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------- |
| Manufacturer     | Xiaomi Auto                      |
| Model            | Xiaomi YU7 B4 (Pro AWD)          |
| Vehicle Type     | Mid-size Luxury Electric SUV     |
| Body Style       | 5-door SUV                       |
| Seating Capacity | 5                                |
| Drivetrain       | Dual Motor All-Wheel Drive (AWD) |
| Platform         | Modena EV Platform               |

name: Toyota Toyota Grand Highlander 2024
description: The 2024 Toyota Grand Highlander is a premium three-row family SUV offering seating for up to eight passengers, a spacious third row, up to 5,000 lbs towing capacity, advanced Toyota Safety Sense 3.0 technology, and a choice of efficient hybrid or powerful turbocharged engines. It is one of Toyota's most practical and comfortable family SUVs.
features:
| Specification | Details                    |
| ------------- | -------------------------- |
| Engine        | 2.4L Turbocharged Inline-4 |
| Horsepower    | 265 hp                     |
| Torque        | 310 lb-ft (420 Nm)         |
| Transmission  | 8-Speed Automatic          |
| Drive Type    | FWD or AWD                 |
| 0–100 km/h    | ~7.0 seconds               |
| Top Speed     | ~180 km/h                  |
| Fuel Type     | Regular Petrol             |
